responsibilities: Describes the high-level vision and objectives of the ArchSpine mirror system
Explains the orchestration and interactions between system modules

English.purpose: This document provides a conceptual overview of the ArchSpine mirror system, outlining its core vision and the orchestration of its modules.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for architects, developers, and stakeholders who need a high-level understanding of the system's design principles and module interactions.
key_takeaways: ArchSpine is a mirror system with a clear vision
Modules are orchestrated to work together seamlessly
The document serves as a blueprint for system evolution

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档概述了ArchSpine镜像系统的核心理念，阐述了系统愿景及模块编排方式。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向架构师、开发人员及相关利益方，帮助他们从宏观层面理解系统的设计原则和模块之间的交互。
key_takeaways: ArchSpine是一个具有明确愿景的镜像系统
各模块通过编排实现无缝协作
本文档作为系统演进的蓝图
